mission.title: linkerd: Add selectors to MWC
mission.description: Add selectors to MWC . Requested by 5+ users.

steps.title: Check current linkerd deployment
steps.description:
Verify your linkerd version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n linkerd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=linkerd
helm list -n linkerd 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working linkerd installation.

steps.title: Review linkerd configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant linkerd configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n linkerd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=linkerd
kubectl get configmap -n linkerd -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=linkerd
```
## What problem are you trying to solve?

When running in `--ha` mode, it can be surprising to have your cluster broken by taking down the proxy injector.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Add selectors to MWC
steps.description:
When running linkerd in HA mode, a cluster can be broken by bringing down the proxy-injector.

Add a label to MWC namespace selctor that skips any namespace.

*Note: This PR should be followed by a docs update, per #3346, that indicates that users should add the `linkerd.io/skip-webhook` label to
```yaml
namespaceSelector:
    matchExpressions:
    - key: linkerd.io/skip-webhook
      operator: DoesNotExist
    - key: linkerd.io/is-control-plane
      operator: DoesNotExist
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n linkerd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=linkerd
kubectl get events -n linkerd --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Add selectors to MWC " is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
When running linkerd in HA mode, a cluster can be broken by bringing down the proxy-injector.

Add a label to MWC namespace selctor that skips any namespace.

*Note: This PR should be followed by a docs update, per #3346, that indicates that users should add the `linkerd.io/skip-webhook` label to `kube-system` when running in `--ha` mode.*
codeSnippets:
namespaceSelector:
    matchExpressions:
    - key: linkerd.io/skip-webhook
      operator: DoesNotExist
    - key: linkerd.io/is-control-plane
      operator: DoesNotExist

Introduce Pull Request Template

GitHub's community guidelines recommend a pull request template, the repo was
lacking one.

Introduce a `PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md` file.

Once merged, the
[Community profile checklist](https://github.com/linkerd/linkerd2/community)
should indicate the repo now provides a pull request template.

Fixes #3321

Signed-off-by: Jane Smith <jane.smith@example.com>

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with linkerd installed or the issue environment reproducible.
